msg.externalteleport.no_prepare: Cannot teleport without Preparing State. Enter with %s
text.autoconfig.externalteleport.title: ExternalTeleport Config
Command to execute when teleporting

To play sounds serverside, integrate into custom command (or function) and execute that instead.
